news.headline: eBay's Circular Fashion Fund expands globally to include US and Germany; applications open until November 15, 2024. 15 businesses supported previously.
news.summary: EBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY) recently announced the expansion of its Circular Fashion Fund (CFF) on a global scale. The fund is aimed at assisting fashion start-ups with developing and implementing circular solutions, such as rental and repair services. Interested parties have the opportunity to apply for the fund until November 15, 2024, with eligible tech start-ups and small businesses encouraged to submit their applications through eBay’s official website.Since its launch in the U.K. in 2022, eBay’s Circular Fashion Fund (CFF) has already provided support to 15 businesses, including The Seam and RCYCL, as they work towards scaling their circular fashion solutions. Now in its third year, the fund is broadening its reach to the United States and Germany, building on the success experienced in Australia. This expansion is in line with eBay’s dedication to nurturing the circular economy. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Matador Resources Co. raises quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, 25% increase from $0.20 per share prev.
news.summary: In Dallas, Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) shared that its Board of Directors has updated its dividend policy. The revision includes the plan to offer cash dividends on common stock at $0.25 per share per quarter, totaling $1.00 per share annually. This adjustment marks a 25% increase from the prior rate of $0.20 per share per quarter. The implementation is set to commence in Q4 of 2024. Additionally, the Board has approved a quarterly cash...

news.headline: NiSource (NYSE: NI) to release Q3 financial results on Oct 30 and host conference call at 11 a.m. ET. More details at website.

(NYSE: NI) from Merrillville, Indiana, has scheduled a conference call on October 30, 2024, at 11 a.m. ET (10 a.m. CT) to discuss its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 and offer a business update. The company will disclose these results before the U.S. financial markets open on the same day. To listen to the live conference call, interested individuals can access the NiSource website on October 30.

news.headline: Global Marine Buoy Market expected to reach US$ 1,486.3 million by 2034, growing at 4.9% CAGR. US leads with 72.4% share in 2024.
news.summary: The global Marine Buoy Market is set to reach US$ 921.2 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 4.9% through 2034, aiming for a valuation of US$ 1,486.3 million by 2034. The growth is attributed to maritime safety regulations, advancements in oil and gas development, and increasing demand for shipping. Marine buoys serve as navigational aids and ensure safety in the maritime industry. North America's market is expected to grow at 5.1%, with the US holding 72.4% of the market in 2024. China is also anticipated to have a significant market share at 56.9% in 2024. Companies worldwide are investing in research, navigation, and sensor technology to capitalize on this expanding industry.

Additionally, the company established key strategic partnerships while participating in the event.

With a strong presence in the market, CGI continues to expand its reach by partnering with key entities like the Swedish Tax Agency to provide cutting-edge services.

news.headline: Legal-Bay Pre Settlement Funding streamlines application for Wyoming plaintiffs; hires staff, launches new website. Oct 16, 2024.

Based in CHEYENNE, Wyo., the company, Legal-Bay Pre Settlement Funding, made the announcement on Oct. 16, 2024, as per PRNewswire. They are reaching out to plaintiffs in Wyoming, particularly in areas like Laramie and Yellowstone. This initiative aims to cater to a larger number of clients and streamline the process of obtaining lawsuit loans.

news.headline: Polymer foam market to reach $142.02 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™. Various resin types & end-use industries involved.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Polymer Foam Market was released. The report covers various aspects including Resin Type such as PU, PS, PO, Phenolic, Foam Type including Rigid and Flexible, and End-Use Industries like Building & Construction, Packaging, Automotive, Furniture & Bedding, Footwear, Sports, and Recreational sectors. The study delves into different regions to provide a comprehensive analysis. This market analysis encompasses crucial data on the industry, with a focus on resin types such as PU, PS, PO, and Phenolic. Moreover, it evaluates foam types, highlighting both rigid and flexible categories. The report also outlines the significance of various end-use industries including Building & Construction, Packaging, Automotive, Furniture & Bedding, Footwear, as well as Sports and Recreational sectors. Additionally, it analyzes the market across different regions to offer valuable insights.

The press release and accompanying presentation will be posted on the company's website before the market opens on the same day. All interested individuals can access the information. The specific details regarding the conference call schedule were not provided in the brief.

news.headline: Nova Minerals drills 39m @ 5.4 g/t Au at Estelle Gold Project in Alaska - part of a shallow drilling program.
news.summary: In Anchorage, Alaska on October 16, 2024, Nova Minerals Limited (NASDAQ: NVA) (ASX: NVA) (FRA: QM3) reported the discovery of high-grade thick intercepts in seven additional holes as part of a 21-hole reverse circulation (RC) drilling initiative within the Estelle Gold Project, spanning over 500km2 in the Tintina Gold Belt in Alaska. The recent drilling program targeted near-surface mineralization at depths less than 50m to support the ongoing Feasibility Study for the RPM starter mine.

news.headline: Kraken Robotics receives $13 million in orders for subsea batteries, offering higher energy density and lighter weight.
news.summary: Kraken Robotics Inc., headquartered in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, shared on October 16, 2024 that it secured orders worth $13 million for SeaPowerTM subsea batteries from its current clients. These batteries, designed for depths up to 6,000 meters, offer double the energy density and are 46% lighter per kWh compared to conventional pressure-housed batteries. The company's stock is listed as TSX-V: PNG and OTCQB: KRKNF.

news.headline: Akamai integrates new Behavioral DDoS Engine into App & API Protector for enhanced detection and mitigation. (Character count: 144)
news.summary: A cutting-edge solution utilizes machine learning and worldwide intelligence to strengthen protection against application-layer DDoS attacks. Developed by Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), a cloud company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, this innovation aims to bolster detection and mitigation capabilities. This advancement signifies a significant step towards improved security measures in the face of cyber threats.

news.headline: J.B. Hunt stock surges premarket as Q3 operating revenue fell 3% Y/Y to $3.07 billion, beating expected $3.02 billion.
news.summary: Shares of J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) are on the rise following the release of its third-quarter results. The company reported a 3% year-over-year decrease in operating revenue to $3.07 billion, surpassing the expected $3.02 billion. This decline was primarily attributed to a 5% decrease in gross revenue per load in Intermodal (JBI) and a 6% drop in Truckload (JBT) revenue compared to the previous year. Furthermore, load volumes decreased by 10% in Integrated Capacity Solutions (ICS) and 6% in Dedicated Contract Services (DCS). For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

This objective aligns with the potential under a fresh federal government and the current trend of economic development.

This recognition also signifies Gathid's leadership in the identity and access governance sector. The certification was awarded on October 16, 2024, with SEATTLE and GOLD COAST, Australia being key locations for the company. This achievement solidifies Gathid's position in the market and showcases its strong commitment to protecting user information.

news.headline: Trua patents dynamic trust credential for real-time verification and data sharing to reduce fraud risks.
news.summary: Trua has recently introduced a groundbreaking patented technology that allows for the creation of trust profiles, facilitating real-time verification and giving users control over data sharing. This innovation aims to improve compliance measures and lower the risks associated with fraud. Headquartered in McLean, Virginia, the company made this announcement on October 16, 2024. Trua is renowned for its leadership in the field of reutilizable and verified digital trust solutions, revolutionizing user trust with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Embraer invests ~$70M to expand MRO services in Fort Worth, TX, creating aviation jobs. New center to open in 2025.
news.summary: Embraer S.A. (NYSE: ERJ) has revealed plans to enhance its maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services in the U.S. through the inauguration of a new service center at Perot Field Alliance Airport in Fort Worth, Texas. This move is aimed at providing support for the company's expanding fleet of E-Jets. The initiative, developed in collaboration with Fort Worth, Denton County, and Texas, will commence operations in an existing hangar by the second quarter of 2025, with a second hangar expected to be constructed by 2027. The expansion is anticipated to significantly boost its MRO capabilities in the region.

news.headline: US Deputy Secretary of State Campbell: There are signs of North Korea's enhanced material support for Russia.
American Lung Association invests $22 million in lung health research, funding 139 projects, solidifying its leadership in the field.
news.summary: An organization has recently supported 139 projects as part of its commitment to advancing lung health research. The American Lung Association Research Institute revealed a significant research investment of $22 million within the last year, solidifying its position as a leading contributor in the field. This initiative showcases the organization's ongoing dedication to supporting innovative research initiatives aimed at improving lung health.

news.headline: Verisk estimates insured losses for Hurricane Milton at USD 30-50 billion due to wind, storm surge, and flood losses in Florida.
news.summary: In Boston on October 16, 2024, the Extreme Event Solutions team at Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) projected that the insured industry losses from Hurricane Milton on onshore property would range from USD 30 billion to USD 50 billion. This estimate covers damages from wind, privately insured storm surge estimates, and privately insured flood losses caused by precipitation following the hurricane's landfall in Florida. Wind-related damages account for the majority of the insured losses.

news.headline: Promising fentanyl vaccine in development could help combat opioid crisis.
NGOs can utilize blockchain tech for faster aid distribution. Mercy Corps CIO shares insights.
news.summary: Blockchain technology is revolutionizing the distribution of humanitarian aid with its speed and efficiency. According to Scott Onder, Chief Information Officer of Mercy Corps, this innovative approach is crucial in delivering assistance in a swift and effective manner. With blockchain, the process of delivering aid is streamlined, allowing for quick response to emergency situations. This technology has the potential to significantly impact global aid efforts.

news.headline: Poll by LCF & BSP Research shows California Latino voters crucial in US House balance, focusing on CA-13 with 50% Latino voters.
news.summary: A recent poll conducted by the Latino Community Foundation (LCF) in collaboration with BSP Research revealed crucial insights about Latino voters in California's five competitive congressional districts. These districts play a significant role in deciding the party that will hold the U.S. House of Representatives in the next term, with Latino voters representing a substantial portion of each district. Specifically, in CA-13 (Merced), Latinos constitute 50% of all eligible voters. This data underscores the importance of Latino voter turnout in these key districts for the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Medigene to present at 3 upcoming scientific conferences in Oct-Nov 2024: PEGS in Barcelona, Cell 2024 in London, SITC in Houston.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Medigene AG, a company specializing in oncology research and development of T cell receptor (TCR)-guided therapies for cancer treatment, announced its participation at key conferences. The Company, listed as FSE: MDG1 on Prime Standard, will present at the 16th Annual Protein & Antibody Engineering Summit (PEGS) in Barcelona from November 5-7, 2024, and at the Cell 2024 conference in London from November 6-8, 2024. Additionally, Medigene will showcase two posters at the 39th Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) in Houston, TX, USA from November 6-10, 2024.
